regime_fall.current_status: Day 37 of conflict shows simultaneous escalation and diplomatic movement: US conducted deep penetration rescue missions in Iran, deployed additional Marines, and issued 48-hour ultimatums on the Strait of Hormuz, while contradictory signals emerge from Iranian leadership regarding peace negotiations mediated by Pakistan, Egypt, and Turkey.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei was killed on February 28, 2026, with his son Mojtaba appointed as successor on March 1, 2026, triggering severe internal power struggles between hardliners controlling the IRGC and moderates seeking diplomatic resolution.
